description_long: This is a rustic, round loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust and a slightly domed top. The surface is marked by a prominent central score running lengthwise, with a rough, uneven texture and some visible flour dusting. The crust appears crisp and well-baked, with subtle variations in color from light tan to deeper brown, suggesting artisanal baking. The sides are rounded and the base is slightly flattened, giving the loaf a sturdy, compact appearance. Small inclusions and irregularities in the crust hint at a hearty, possibly multigrain or seeded interior. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A rustic, round loaf of bread with a golden-brown, thick crust and a central score, featuring a rough, artisanal texture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central score and the slightly domed, golden-brown crust with flour dusting.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rounded, thick crust and the compact, sturdy base of the loaf.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuation of the central score and the rough, uneven surface texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the rounded edge and the consistent, well-baked crust.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features a prominent central score with a rough, rustic texture and light flour dusting, giving it an artisanal appearance.
